zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beach於1620年出生在英國英格蘭肯特帕特利布恩時，她的父親Robert Beach49歲，母親Mrs. Robert Beach44歲。她於大約1639年與William Robinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1664年10月7日到1666年8月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Beach于1620年出生在英国英格兰肯特帕特利布恩时，她的父亲Robert Beach49岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Beach44岁。她于大约1639年与William Robinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于从1664年10月7日到1666年8月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Beach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English beche ‘beech-tree’ (Old English bēce) or Middle English beche ‘stream’ (Old English bæce). Middle English beche may be from Old English bēce ‘beech’ or bæce ‘stream’, and without further evidence it is impossible to distinguish these in Middle English.
Americanized form of Alsatian and German Bitsch: habitational name from Bitche (German Bitsch) in Alsace and Lorraine, at the foot of the northern slope of the Vosges.
Americanized form of German (mainly Hesse) Bitsch: unexplained.

variants.name: Beech
meanings: Americanized form of German or Alsatian Bitsch (see Beach ) or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Beecher
meanings: English (Kent): from Middle English becher, denoting one who lived by a beech-tree, from an agent derivative of Middle English beche ‘beech-tree’ (see Beach ), the -er suffix having a locative sense. This English name is also common in Ireland, particularly in Cork.
Americanized form of German Bücher (cognate with 1 above) (see Bucher ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beach was born in 1620, in Patrixbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Beach, was 49 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Beach, was 44. She married William Robinson about 1639, in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 7 October 1664 to 21 August 1666, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beach est née en 1620, à Patrixbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Beach, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Beach, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William Robinson environ 1639, à Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée du 7 octobre 1664 au 21 août 1666, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

August 1666 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beach è nata il nel 1620 nel Patrixbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Beach, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Robert Beach, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato William Robinson circa 1639, nel Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 7 ottobre 1664 a 21 agosto 1666, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Beachが1620年にイギリスイギリスケントプアトリクスボウルンで生まれた時，父Robert Beachは49歳，母Mrs. Robert Beachは44歳であった。約1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニードールチェスターでWilliam Robinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1664年10月7日まで1666年8月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beach(이)가 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 패트리스보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Beach(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Beach(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1639년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터에서 William Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 10월 7일부터 1666년 8월 21일까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beach nasceu em 1620, em Patrixbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Beach, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Beach, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com William Robinson aproximadamente 1639, em Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu de 7 de outubro de 1664 a 21 de agosto de 1666, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beach родилась в 1620 г. в местности патриксбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Beach было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Beach, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Robinson около 1639 г. в местности дорчестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 7 октября 1664 по 21 августа 1666 в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Beach nació en 1620, en Patrixbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Beach, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert Beach, tenía 44 años. Se casó con William Robinson aproximadamente 1639, en Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 7 de octubre de 1664 hasta 21 de agosto de 1666, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
